papers.title: Cambridge-style — Urban green spaces
papers.description: Mẫu định dạng: passage + trắc nghiệm. Thay bằng đề của bạn trong papers.json.

passages.title: Passage 1
passages.text:
Urban green spaces such as parks and community gardens are increasingly recognised as essential for public health. They provide opportunities for physical activity, reduce exposure to noise and air pollution, and support mental wellbeing. City planners now integrate 'green corridors' to connect neighbourhoods with nature.

However, maintenance costs and unequal distribution remain challenges. In many cities, wealthier districts enjoy more tree cover and safer playgrounds than peripheral housing estates.

questions.prompt: According to the passage, green corridors are designed to:
options: Link areas of the city with natural spaces
Reduce the number of public parks

questions.prompt: What problem does the writer mention?
options: Costs and uneven access to green areas
Lack of interest in physical activity

papers.title: Section demo — Short lecture
papers.description: Audio mẫu trong /public/audio (offline). Đổi audioUrl khi có đề thật.

questions.prompt: Demo: chọn đáp án (thay nội dung theo transcript thật).

papers.title: Task 2 — Opinion
papers.description: Viết bài theo đề; lưu nộp qua API skill-progress.
papers.taskPrompt:
Some people believe that public transport should be free for all city residents. Others think users should pay. Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

Write at least 250 words.

papers.title: Part 2 — Cue card
papers.description: Luyện nói theo cue card; ghi chú / upload file (MVP: lưu ghi chú).
papers.cueCard:
Describe a place you like to study or work.

You should say:
- where it is
- how often you go there
- what you do there

and explain why you like studying or working there.
